name: RABBIT-CAGE-8
title: No RABBIT_ROOT anchor: ~30 scripts independently count ../ levels to find repo root — fragile under any file move
description: Every script in the repo independently computes the repo root by counting parent directory levels from its own location (e.g. cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../../../.." && pwd). Three different computation strategies are in use: counted-../, git rev-parse --show-toplevel, and $0-relative. The count is wrong in at least one case (dispatch-feature-edit.sh uses 5 levels instead of 4). Moving any script silently breaks its root computation. No shared RABBIT_ROOT variable or helper exists. The onboard/scripts/rabbit-project.sh already has the right pattern (REPO_ROOT="${REPO_ROOT:-$(cd ...)}") — this should be the universal pattern with RABBIT_ROOT as the env var name.

history.note: Fixed: all scripts now use RABBIT_ROOT env var with git-rev-parse fallback instead of counted ../ levels
